nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
Subject: She opens the door, stepping back out into the rainy street — but now smiling.
Scene: Street glistening, city lights beginning to glow as dusk falls.
Action: She opens her umbrella with one smooth motion and walks away, shoulders relaxed. Camera holds on the doorway as she fades into the soft, rainy bokeh — then gently fades to white.
